_comment: Labeled retrieval eval set. 'source' is the doc that should answer the query (source-level relevance). 'kind' tags whether the query favors exact-term matching (BM25) or meaning (dense) — used only for reading the results, not for scoring.

queries.q: What sits at the center of the Milky Way?
Why can nothing get back out once it crosses the boundary?
Why can a rocket work without any outside air?
Why are large launch vehicles built in stages?
How fast must a spacecraft go to leave Earth's gravity?
What fraction of the Solar System's mass is the Sun?
What is the difference between gas giants and ice giants?
What makes a dwarf planet different from a regular planet?
What happens to a star like the Sun when it runs out of fuel?
What is left behind after a supernova?
How high above Earth does the ISS orbit?
Why do astronauts on the station appear weightless?
How many sunrises does the ISS crew see each day?
